title: Uncraftable Trims & Sherds
description: Adds ability to uncraft armor trims and sherds to the useful resources!
body:
Uncraftable Trims & Sherds Mod 🔄

The Uncraftable Trims & Sherds Mod introduces a new, game-changing feature in Minecraft — the ability to uncraft armor trims and pottery sherds, transforming them back into valuable resources! Say goodbye to wasted materials and hello to efficient recycling of precious items like bricks, stones, diamonds, and more. ♻️

📋 Key Features

Uncraft Armor Trims: Break down armor trims into useful materials, allowing you to repurpose valuable resources like diamonds and iron. 💎
Uncraft Pottery Sherds: Convert pottery sherds back into base materials such as bricks and stones, perfect for your next building project. 🏺🧱

🛠️ New Additions

Uncrafting Table: A powerful new crafting station that allows players to uncraft armor trims and pottery sherds. Easy to craft and essential for resource optimization! 🛠️
Diamond Nugget: A new item that gives players more flexibility in using and managing diamonds. Now you can uncraft diamonds into smaller, more manageable parts for specific crafting needs. 💎✨

This mod is perfect for players who want to make the most out of their hard-earned materials, offering a new layer of resource management and recycling. Whether you're an adventurer looking to recover resources or a builder in need of extra materials, Uncraftable Trims & Sherds is the mod for you!

Stay tuned for future updates, including images and videos showcasing all the exciting features!
